---
title: "Quick Start with EasyProtein"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Quick Start with EasyProtein}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(EasyProtein)
```
